case_title: PATEL, N.R. vs. FRASER, ALBERT et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS DE MARCO, CHRISTINE SUED AS D'EMARCO, CHRISTINE TO BE DE MARCO CHRISTINE

CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ARNOLD EVJE AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/CLAUDIA BRISSON AS COUNSEL. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 51 6TH ST, #603, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 3-29-94, 5PM - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE BY 3-29-94, THEY PAY PL. $5,212.74 RENT & DAMAGES (OTHERWISE, RENT & DAMAGES ARE WVD) - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY. FEES - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - DEFS. CERTIFY THEY ARE THE ONLY OCCUPANTS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRASER, ALBERT DE MARCO CHRISTINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 51 6TH ST, #603, S.F, CA. $5,212.74 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,212.74, STAYED UNTIL MAR-29-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PL. WAIVES ALL RENT & DAMAGES IF DEF. VACATES BY 5PM, 3-29- 94. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF. CERTIF. NO OTHER OCCUPANTS ON PREMISE S. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT FRASER, ALBERT DE MARCO CHRISTINE SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FRASER, ALBERT DE MARCO CHRISTINE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FRASER, ALBERT DE MARCO CHRISTINE
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT FRASER, ALBERT
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FRASER, ALBERT DE MARCO CHRISTINE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.14 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS FRASER, ALBERT SUED AS FRISER, ALBERT TO BE FRASER, ALBERT

DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY DEFENDANT FRASER, ALBERT DE MARCO CHRISTINE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-07-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 2225P1150000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO CLAUDIA W. BRISSON, ATTORNEY, WARRANT #00014712, DATED MAR-28-1994
